title: Cobblemon Instant-Run
description: A small QoL mod that makes the run button in cobblemon battles actually work.
body:
**Cobblemon Instant-Run**  
Makes the **Run** button in the battle screen actually **flee** — finally!

By default that button does literally nothing and you still have to sprint away on foot. This tiny QoL mod fixes it so one click = instant escape from wild battles.

- Click **Run** in the battle GUI → instant flee from wild encounters  
- Trainer / PvP battles unchanged (completely safe for servers)  
- Lightweight  

**Dependencies**
- **Required**: Cobblemon, Fabric Language Kotlin, Fabric API

**Also available on:**  
[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblerun) • [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblerun)
